title: Resolution Commending and Congratulating the Sangguniang Barangay of Batong Malake Through the Leadership of the Honorable Barangay Chairman Ian S. Kalaw and Efforts of the Whole Sangguniang Barangay for Being Declared As One of the National Passers of the Seal of Good Local Governance for Barangay (SGLGB) Amongst 549 Barangays in the Philippines.
